name: Planet Fitness, Inc.
summary: PART I Planet Fitness, Inc. is a Delaware corporation formed on March16, 2015. Planet Fitness, Inc. Class A common stock trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol PLNT. Our Company Fitness for everyone We are one of the largest and fastest-growing franchisors and operators of fitness centers in the world by number of members and locations, with a highly recognized national brand.
